name: Rand Paul
subject: Last night I put NSA spying on life support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

What a week!

It all culminated last night around 1:30 AM when the U.S. Senate attempted to ram through legislation to keep the NSA's illegal domestic spy programs alive.

The first vote was on the House passed "reform" bill, which still allows bulk data collection under another method.

It failed, leaving spy-state apologists only one option - _to ram through some type of short-term extension of the unconstitutional "Patriot" Act_.

Fellow Conservative, I stood up to the surveillance state every step of way.

I refused to back down - objecting to EVERY short-term extension attempt made last night.

As a result, the Senate was forced to adjourn WITHOUT reauthorizing the "Patriot" Act - meaning the beast is set to expire on May 31st.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958505:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)

When the Senate comes back into session next Sunday, they'll have only 8 hours to pass a bill before the "Patriot" Act expires.

_That means if you and I can hold the spy state off for only 8 more hours, we'll relegate the NSA's illegal spy program to the trash bin of history where it belongs_.

But to do that I'm going to need your help throughout next week.

The truth is, this fight is extremely important to our future.

The Founders understood Liberty cannot long survive without privacy.

Most conservatives know government registration of firearms would ultimately lead to gun confiscation.

It's no different with the rest of our lives.

Once government bureaucrats know every aspect of our lives - what we watch, what we buy, what we eat, where we worship - it won't be long until they try to run them "for our own good."

_That's why it's critical you and I hold the spy state off for 8 more hours on May 31st_.

My staff is preparing a few videos of exactly what happened last night on the Senate floor.

As soon as they're uploaded and ready, I'll be sure to send them to you.

_Thanks to your support, you and I won a stunning victory this week. We proved if freedom-loving Americans stand and fight the Washington Machine - we can win_!

But I'm afraid our job is not over yet.

**[So I hope I can count on you to continue to stand with me in this fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958505:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958506:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958507:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958508:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958509:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958505:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)
In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958510:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958511:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27958512:26870679442:m:1:879035888:BA2A5823C2A2552D1A04AA172044A237:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Team Marco
subject: Don't forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181293:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r)
---
Peter, We wanted to send you a quick reminder that the deadline to enter the Las Vegas contest is Sunday at 11:59 pm. Don't miss out on your chance to celebrate Marco's birthday with him in Las Vegas at a party hosted by Rick Harrison from TV's Pawn Stars. **[_Click here to donate and enter._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181294:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r)** We'll take care of your flight and your hotel. [_**All you have to do is enter!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181294:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r) Team Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181295:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181296:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181297:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r)
Marco Rubio Las Vegas Birthday Contest Rules -Contest ends May 24, 2015
-Limit one entry per individual
-Make a contribution and also enter
-[You can also enter here without making a contribution.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181298:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r)
-See full terms and conditions below NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. [To enter by making a contribution, click here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181299:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r). [To enter without making a contribution, click here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42181298:17205296341:m:1:1349778030:91F909617D1553B7C10C5301A169BD2A:r). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on May 19, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Sunday, May 24, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Saturday, May 31, 2014. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: one round trip coach airfare to Las Vegas, Nevada, with an approximate retail value of eight hundred dollars ($800); admission to Marco Rubio's Las Vegas Birthday Party Hosted by Rick Harrison, with an approximate retail value of five hundred dollars ($500); one night's stay at a Las Vegas hotel, with an approximate retail value of two hundred dollars ($200); ground transportation costs must be covered by the winner. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of the United States and are at least 21 years of age.. Prize not redeemable for cash. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, FL 33255-8701.

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Wishing you a restful and reverent Memorial Day weekend!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqjJZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4AS8pkI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

Every day we live in freedom is a day purchased with the blood of the men and women who have worn the uniform of our nation and paid the ultimate price. We will never be able to express enough thanks for their sacrifice, but we can promise it will never be forgotten, nor shall it be in vain. Over Memorial Day weekend, I hope you'll join us in remembering those who have fallen and commit to carrying on the torch of liberty for future generations.

It was also another fantastic week for the Cruz for President Campaign. In recent weeks, we began rolling out our state leadership teams across the nation. T <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-iowa-leadership-team/>he first was in Iowa <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-iowa-leadership-team/>, next was South Carolina <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-south-carolina-leadership-team/>, and then in New Hampshire <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/1386/>. We also had Saul Anuzis and Ron Nehring come on board to serve as our Michigan and California Chairmen, respectively.

Building on that momentum, yesterday, Cruz for President announced <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-announces-wendy-day-michigan-state-director/> Wendy Day, the current Vice Chair of the Michigan Republican Party and Liberty movement leader, will serve as the Michigan State Director for the campaign. “Wendy is a great fit because she is no stranger to grassroots politics at every level. Her influence in the Great Lake State and commitment to freedom make her a valued member of our team,” Ted said about the announcement, and all of Team Cruz is thrilled to have Wendy on board!

And back here in Texas, the Cruz for President Campaign announced <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/texas-congressmen-endorse-ted-cruz-for-president/> endorsements by four members of the Lone Star State's Congressional delegation! We're proud to have the support of courageous conservatives like Congressmen John Culberson, Louie Gohmert, Michael Burgess, and John Ratcliffe, and we'd love to have your support too <http://support.tedcruz.org/pledge/>!

Last Friday, Ted also attended <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/ted-on-the-trail-georgia-crowd-shouts-we-want-cruz/> the Georgia Republican Party’s State Convention where he delivered a speech that elicited cheers and chants of "We want Cruz" from the delegates in attendance. You can watch his remarks here <https://vimeo.com/128103656>.

Again, I hope you have a restful and reverent Memorial Day weekend!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President
Press Clips

Louie Gohmert and Three Other Texas Congressmen Back Ted Cruz for 2016
Breitbart <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/breitbart-louie-gohmert-and-three-other-texas-congressmen-back-ted-cruz-for-2016/>

CBN <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/cbn-ted-cruz-to-liberal-reporter-do-you-have-a-personal-animosity-against-christians-sir/>

Fox News <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/fox-news-michelle-malkin-most-intriguing-candidate-is-ted-cruz/>

Ted Cruz says he’s the ‘proven conservative’ in 2016 GOP field
Atlanta Journal-Constitution <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/atlanta-journal-constitution-ted-cruz-says-hes-the-proven-conservative-in-2016-gop-field/>

Ted Cruz invests time at Georgia GOP convention
Cobb County Conservative Examiner <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/cobb-county-conservative-examiner-ted-cruz-invests-time-at-georgia-gop-convention/>

Ted Cruz Was Fearless Yesterday
RedState <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/redstate-ted-cruz-was-fearless-yesterday/>
CRUZ VIDEOS

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CZMgy2FrNo8>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S88UrYz8BTg>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zOS4Ia5BnPc>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t2Q6pA61cug>
Courageous Conservatives

Reigniting the Promise of America

Copyright 2015 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy <http://www.tedcruz.org/privacy-policy/>
PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www.tedcruz.org <http://www.tedcruz.org>
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqjJZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4AS8pkI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.

name: Dennis Cheng, Hillary for America
subject: Your chance to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Your chance to meet Hillary. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

I'm not asking you to donate. (Really!) Believe it or not, what I want right now is to give YOU something: the opportunity of a lifetime.

We're flying a winner and their guest out to the launch rally we're putting together next month, where you'll meet Hillary and see her speak. This is going to be one of our biggest events this year, and you could be the special guest -- **[all you have to do is add your name.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Now, I will ask you later to chip in again. (Promise!) This organization has a lot of growing to do, after all, and your support is how we're able to get bigger and stronger.

Today I just want to make sure you don't miss the chance to be there when this campaign takes off.

**Add your name right now to be automatically entered for a chance to fly out and meet Hillary at our (first-ever!) rally:**

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Good luck!

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3MDQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMjg5MDM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

We're flying a winner and their guest out to the launch rally we're putting together next month, where you'll meet Hillary and see her speak. This is going to be one of our biggest events this year, and you could be the special guest -- Now, I will ask you later to chip in again. (Promise!) This organization has a lot of growing to do, after all, and your support is how we're able to get bigger and stronger. Today I just want to make sure you don't miss the chance to be there when this campaign takes off. Add your name right now to be automatically entered for a chance to fly out and meet Hillary at our (first-ever!) rally: Good luck! Dennis Dennis Cheng National Finance Director Hillary for America Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing or click to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Katie Dowd, Hillary for America
subject: You. Meeting Hillary. In person.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Your chance to meet Hillary. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MDQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMzA0MTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

We've got a spot saved for you (and a friend!).

Our big campaign kickoff is coming up fast -- you need to feel the energy and excitement of this campaign. In person. Next to Hillary.

[**Sign up to be automatically entered to be flown out for our campaign kickoff rally to meet Hillary.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI3MDQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMzA0MTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

The collective energy of the people in the room -- and Hillary herself -- makes it all a truly powerful experience. This will be the first rally of this campaign, and you get the chance to see it for yourself from the best seat in the house.

**Sign up to be automatically entered to join Hillary for our campaign kickoff event:

[ https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI3MDQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMzA0MTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I'll see you there,

Katie

Katie Dowd
Digital Director
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI3MDQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMzA0MTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI3MDQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMzA0MTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3MDQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMzA0MTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law).
